scripts.verify: npm run build && node scripts/check-client-imports.mjs && node scripts/check-where-boundaries.mjs && node dist/example/scripts/generate-binding-map.js --check && node dist/example/scripts/generate-compiled-views.js --check && node --test dist/tests
scripts.dev: npm run build && npm run start
scripts.dev:watch: npm run build && NODE_ENV=development node dist/example/server-dev.js
scripts.bench:ssr: npm run bench 2>&1 | grep -A 100 'SSR & Resume Performance'
